speaker: speaker1
text: I want to see the man responsible for selling typewriters .

speaker: speaker2
text: My name is Steven . I'm the Sales Manager of this company .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , look here . Ten new typewriters were delivered to my company yesterday afternoon and only five of them work properly .

speaker: speaker1
text: Never mind being sorry , what are you going to do about it ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Don't worry , we'll soon fix them .

speaker: speaker1
text: Good , I hope you'll make sure that it won't happen again .
